body_txt: Within many works, the separation between science and magic can be blurred to deceive a bystander. In some cases, one may masquerade as the other. In still others, the distinction is truly erased . This is an important justification for many forms of Applied Phlebotinum . Trope Namer for these corollaries: Sufficiently Analyzed Magic , Sufficiently Advanced Alien , and Sufficiently Advanced Bamboo Technology , as well as the reverse Insufficiently Advanced Alien . In case you're wondering, here are all three laws. The first and second laws are partially covered by And You Thought It Would Fail and Beyond the Impossible , respectively. Compare with Clarke's Law for Girls' Toys , Doing In the Wizard , First Church of Mecha , Machine Worship , Magic from Technology , Magic Tool , and The Spark of Genius . Contrast with Doing in the Scientist , Fantastic Science , and Magic-Powered Pseudoscience . Compare and contrast Magic by Any Other Name , Magitek , and Placebotinum Effect . See also Cargo Cult , Giving Radio to the Romans , God Guise , and Science Fantasy .
